name: Buttermilk Pancakes with Strawberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
To make pancakes, combine dry ingredients in a large bowl. Add milk, eggs, and melted butter to the dry mixture. Stir until moistened (there should be some lumps). Use 1/3 cup batter for each pancake. Makes 15 4-inch pancakes.
To make sauce, combine sugar, cornstarch, and orange juice in a saucepan over medium heat. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened. Add strawberries and cook for an additional minute. Remove from heat and stir in butter. Use to top pancakes and garnish with blueberries.
